summary: Recording source unknown but the second set is praised as blazing with a nice edge
review: The sole fan review highlights an especially fiery second set, calling it “blazing” and noting a nice edge to the performance. No details are provided about the recording source or sound quality, so the audio fidelity remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review that praises the show’s second set but gives no information on recording quality; rating leans toward a solid performance but limited data keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the review.
